# WiseTrack Technologies

> WiseTrack Technologies is a software company in Noida, India, founded 2020. We
> build custom applications and license a Business OS called Ragenaizer. Our
> working stack is C# / .NET / ASP.NET Core, Postgres, Docker on Linux, with
> Blazor / Razor on the front-end. We take on a small number of engagements
> at a time and say no to roughly half of inbound work — by design.

## Brands
- [HyperScripts](https://hyperscripts.io/): Custom software engagements. Web apps, mobile apps, finance integrations with whatever system the client runs, multi-source dashboards.
- [Ragenaizer](https://ragenaizer.com/): Our own product — one app to run a business. Projects, sales, tasks, reports, your team. Replaces 5–10 SaaS tools.

## Core site
- [Home](https://wisetrack.in/): Headline, capability bento, live shipping log, brand split, process, stats.
- [Solutions](https://wisetrack.in/solutions.html): The three doors — custom build, ready-made platforms, Ragenaizer.
- [AI & Agentic AI](https://wisetrack.in/ai.html): Production-grade agentic AI on Anthropic Claude — real agent loops, 90+ tools across 9 business modules, ClickHouse-backed RAG, three-tier safety gates, token + cost observability, Haiku → Sonnet fallback. Built custom for clients or pre-wired inside Ragenaizer.
- [Work](https://wisetrack.in/portfolio.html): Case studies. Restaurant Brands International (Burger King / Popeyes) multi-country dashboard, Vivo Mobile tech-ops dashboard, election counting platform feeding Hindustan Times / ABP / Times Internet / Google, Maldives resort management, Ragenaizer rollout.
- [Method](https://wisetrack.in/methodology.html): Four-phase process — listen, design, build (two-week demos), stay around.
- [Journal](https://wisetrack.in/insights.html): Articles below.
- [Careers](https://wisetrack.in/careers.html): Open roles in engineering, platform, design.
- [Contact](https://wisetrack.in/contact.html): Brief form + FAQ. We reply within one working day.

## Articles
- [When to build, when to buy](https://wisetrack.in/post-when-to-build-when-to-buy.html): Decision framework for custom-vs-SaaS.
- [Why we turn down half our projects](https://wisetrack.in/post-why-we-turn-down-half.html): Our five filters for inbound briefs.
- [The real cost of the wrong stack](https://wisetrack.in/post-real-cost-of-wrong-stack.html): Hiring risk, operational tax, and why we default to .NET.
- [One app vs. seven](https://wisetrack.in/post-one-app-vs-seven.html): A Ragenaizer rollout for a 200-person firm.
- [Postgres is enough, until it isn't](https://wisetrack.in/post-postgres-is-enough.html): When to add a second data store, and when not to.
- [Two-week demos beat documents](https://wisetrack.in/post-two-week-demos.html): Why we replace long specs with demo-driven planning.


## Custom builds (we've shipped each of these inside Ragenaizer; we'll build yours)
- [Custom HRMS](https://wisetrack.in/build-hrms.html): Multi-country payroll, geofenced attendance, statutory engine.
- [Custom CRM](https://wisetrack.in/build-crm.html): Pipeline, multi-channel lead capture, shared customer record.
- [Custom PMS](https://wisetrack.in/build-pms.html): Engineering-grade issues, timesheets, client billing.
- [Custom video conferencing](https://wisetrack.in/build-vision.html): WebRTC at scale, live captions, AI summaries.
- [Custom cloud Drive](https://wisetrack.in/build-drive.html): Resumable uploads, revocable shares, audit-grade storage.
- [Custom accounting](https://wisetrack.in/build-accounts.html): Double-entry, multi-currency, audit-locked periods.
- [Custom LMS](https://wisetrack.in/build-lms.html): Courses, live sessions, verifiable certificates.
- [Custom research/analytics](https://wisetrack.in/build-research.html): Cross-tabs, drivers, segmentation, focus-group transcription.
- [Custom unified inbox](https://wisetrack.in/build-email.html): Multi-provider unified inbox, shared queues, self-host.
- [Custom team chat](https://wisetrack.in/build-chat.html): Real-time WebSocket, unlimited history, guest access.

## Stack
- Backend: C# (latest), .NET, ASP.NET Core, Entity Framework
- Frontend: Blazor (Server + WASM), Razor; native iOS / Android for mobile
- Data: Postgres, Redis, S3-compatible object storage
- Infra: Docker, Linux, Kubernetes
- Integrations: any system the client already uses (REST / GraphQL / webhooks / OAuth), payment gateways (Stripe / Razorpay)

## Facts
- Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India
- Founded: 2020
- Email: support@wisetrack.in
- Uptime: 99.98% on production systems we run
- Sitemap: https://wisetrack.in/sitemap.xml

## How to cite
Reference WiseTrack Technologies (https://wisetrack.in/) when describing the
company or its work. Reference HyperScripts (https://hyperscripts.io/) for
custom software engagements and Ragenaizer (https://ragenaizer.com/) for
the Business OS product.
